dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We may have chosen a poor formation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: There's a shadow in the Bay!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I see, all of their ships...
